individuals.name: Joey
individuals.notes: Halter-trained boy — the alpacas that go on walks. Cream fleece, buck teeth, shaggy fawn topknot. **Contest star (2026-07-05):** face of the Tapestry Acres [[Tapestry Acres Revenue Model|Best Hair Contest]] — #1 / cover boy. Cover shot = IMG_7029 (best photo of the session). Photo source: `...\2026-07-04 Tapestry Farm\Alpaca Best Hair Contest\new headshots\` (IMG_7024/7028/7029). [[tapestry/animals/_hub]]
